data.title: Senior Manager Inventory EM
data.raw_snippet:
PURPOSE \& OVERALL RELEVANCE FOR THE ORGANIZATION:



The Senior Manager Inventory acts as financial advisor and business partner inside the DP community, as well as towards product supply, purchasing, brand organization by providing fact\-based data to enable and drive decision\-making. He/she supports the head of DP HUB to build inventory targets, to track and monitor KPIs development and steer the business with on time and fact\-based analysis. data.title: Head of Department – Pediatrics (American Board, Arabic Speaker) - Qatar
data.raw_snippet:
Position Overview
  
A prestigious healthcare institution in Qatar is seeking a highly qualified Head of Department for Pediatrics to lead its pediatric division. The ideal candidate must be American Board Certified in Pediatrics and fluent in Arabic, with a strong background in clinical leadership, multidisciplinary collaboration, and patient\-centered care.
